{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163026AF669B19D3E6671414BE"}"},"total":896},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529070179597648702","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大大写的真好，目前是我在斩神同人文中最好看的。没有让人觉得很尴尬。剧情很自然。有爽点有虐点，不枯燥。主角性格也非常带感，Cp超级好客磕[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]","text_exts":[{"e":16,"s":12,"text":"斩神同人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774254626671414BE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227529070179597648702%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227454253469461924926%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753004502,"group_id":"7454253469461924926","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw02ZnzcJLHzpO7N06brv4hXs7ls6h7vXJ2bGkC8ObwK","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b4d5c0c530484d04afa5ec0d4a0052f3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788654&x-signature=3kIopBpQdmiCnNzxy80silcbAJU%3D","user_id":"3789332963407283","user_name":"&WXW"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3789332963407283","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7454253469461924926","book_info":{"abstract":"小说又名《斩神：对我就是拽哥隔壁那个男娘》
"我四岁那年，喜欢上了隔壁的大姐姐，然后……"
赵云鹤，一个连斩神三分之一都没有看完并且还是挑着自己喜欢的剧情看的清纯男大，一觉醒来，穿越异世，平平安安的过了二十年，在大三暑假去打酱油的路上遇到了传说的的怪物，死亡的前一刻，那些死去的回忆终于开始攻击他，临江市，沧南市，神秘，迷雾国家，这是斩神的世界！
而他，作为穿越者，二十年了，他终于有了属于穿越者的排面——系统。
并且在他还不知情的情况下，开局便有了一个新身份——拽哥一百一十四份情书拥有人，那个隔壁的“大姐姐”
赵云鹤表示，还好家搬得早，不然留给四五岁沈青竹的就是暗恋的邻家姐姐是个男人的恐怖遭遇了。
沈：我是不是在哪里见过你？
